_comment: cortex-viz live session-activity capture. Registers activity_capture.py on every completed tool call (PostToolUse, matcher '.*' = ALL tools incl mcp__* MCP calls, Skill, Bash terminal, Read/Edit/Write) and on each prompt (UserPromptSubmit). The hook fire-and-forget POSTs the event to the running viz server's /api/activity (discovered via ~/.cache/cortex/viz-server.json). Non-blocking, never errors the session. Install: copy these into ~/.claude/settings.json 'hooks' with an absolute command path, or ship as a plugin (CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT resolves automatically).
